def show_summary():
    total = len(tasks)
    completed = sum(
        1 for task in tasks
        if task["status"] == "Completed"
    )
    pending = total - completed
    print("\n" + "=" * 40)
    print("TASK SUMMARY")
    print("=" * 40)
